case_title: CRISTINA ORTIZ VS. ANABESIS MARTINEZ DBA BELLA SALON ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTINA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY ORTIZ, CRISTINA ANABESIS MARTINEZ DBA BELLA SALON MENDEZ, NANCI SANCHEZ DBA BELLA SALON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-26-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-26-2018 BY PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF CRISTINA ORTIZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT #301670. DEFENDANT ANABESIS MARTINEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER CARINNA MCMILLAN #300756. DEFENDANT NANCI MENDEZ IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED COURT SPANISH INTERPRETER CARINNA MCMILLAN #300756. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED FEB-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANABESIS MARTINEZ DBA BELLA SALON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2018 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY ORTIZ, CRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT ANABESIS MARTINEZ DBA BELLA SALON MENDEZ, NANCI SANCHEZ DBA BELLA SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP:$0.00) SERVED FEB-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MENDEZ, NANCI SANCHEZ DBA BELLA SALON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, CRISTINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANABESIS MARTINEZ DBA BELLA SALON MENDEZ, NANCI SANCHEZ DBA BELLA SALON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
